title: koanophyllon barahonense
intro: Koanophyllon barahonense, a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is a plant used in traditional medicine. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Koanophyllon barahonense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Koanophyllon barahonense can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
